description: You are an AV technician preparing content for a 2x2 video wall at a trade show. Using the 4K master video at /home/ga/Videos/tradeshow_master_4k.mp4 (3840x2160), pre-slice the video into four 1920x1080 quadrants (Top-Left, Top-Right, Bottom-Left, Bottom-Right) using exact spatial crops to preserve the original framerate and duration without scaling or squishing. Strip the audio track from all outputs and export them as H.264 MP4 files to the directory /home/ga/Videos/video_wall/ using the naming convention: panel_TL.mp4, panel_TR.mp4, panel_BL.mp4, and panel_BR.mp4. Additionally, create a JSON layout manifest at /home/ga/Documents/wall_manifest.json following the exact structure specified in /home/ga/Documents/wall_specs.txt.
